data.title: Cannabis Cuts Opioid Prescriptions By 53%, Utah Study Suggests
data.description: Discover how cannabis for pain management reduced opioid prescriptions by 53% in Utah, signaling new opportunities for medical markets.

data.title: Insights into Credo Technology Group Q2 Earnings
Zscaler Q1 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, New AI Opportunities, Shares Slide
data.description: Zscaler reported first-quarter revenue of $628 million, beating the consensus estimate of $606.19 million. The cybersecurity company reported adjusted earnings of 77 cents per share, beating analyst estimates of 63 cents per share, according to Benzinga Pro.

data.title: Wall Street Loses Iconic Voice: Art Cashin Dies At 83
data.description: Art Cashin, legendary director of floor operations at UBS and a revered figure at NYSE, passed away at 83. He was known for his market insights and storytelling prowess.
